goal: Find NON-GARCH strategy achieving >$5/day with MTM MDD <$20 on $90 equity, Hyperliquid perps
context: GARCH z-score exhausted at $0.58/day MDD $20 (Calmar 0.029). Need Calmar >0.25. Fee 0.035% taker. 125 pairs in /tmp/bt-pair-cache-5m/

criteria.description: At least 3 fundamentally different strategies tested (not z-score variants)
All strategies use corrected engine (1h-only trail, MTM MDD, correct short PnL)
At least one strategy achieves >$5/day with MTM MDD <$20
Best strategy has WR >50% (high win rate, not low-WR momentum)
Results are honest (no look-ahead bias, realistic fees, MTM MDD)
